stemHtml: An IFR flight in IMC in controlled airspace without radar loses communications. What should the aircraft do?

options.a: Maintain last assigned speed and level for 20 minutes, then adjust per the filed flight plan.
options.b: Maintain last assigned level for 5 minutes, then continue per the flight plan.
options.c: Maintain last assigned speed and level for 10 minutes, then descend in VMC to the nearest aerodrome.
options.d: Maintain last assigned speed and level for 10 minutes, then descend and land at the nearest aerodrome.
